Nav.pastDesc: Archive of past editions with photos

Home.heroSince: INTENSIVE SEMINAR ON DELIVERANCE AND HEALING · SINCE 1995
Home.heroTitle: Five days that will <accent>transform</accent> your life in Christ.
Home.heroLead: SILC is an intensive seminar — in-person or online — where God breaks cycles, restores families and heals deep wounds. Over 100,000 people have already participated.
Home.heroPathPresencialDesc: Five days in a Brazilian or international city, with a full ministry coverage team.
Home.heroPathOnlineDesc: At your own pace, from anywhere in the world. Full content + support from the central team.
Home.heroQuote: I thought I was going as a listener. I came back a new person.
Home.statsParticipants: Lives reached in Brazil and abroad
Home.oQueTitle: An intensive encounter, a full team in coverage.
Home.col1Body: Morning, afternoon and evening — teachings, personal ministry, and time for God to work on whatever needs to be addressed in you.
Home.col2Body: Over 40 volunteer ministers per edition: the speaker teaches, counsellors minister individually, and intercessors provide prayer coverage.
Home.col3Body: You leave with practical tools for your journey — and, in most cases, with entire areas of your life visibly different.
Home.ctaTitle: How do you want to do SILC?
Home.eyebrow: Intensive Seminar on Deliverance and Healing
Home.title: One week that transforms lives forever
Home.description: SILC is an intensive week-long residential seminar that deepens your relationship with God through biblical teaching, counselling and intercession.
Home.upcomingDescription: Find a SILC seminar near you and experience this life-changing week with others.
Home.onlineTitle: SILC at your pace, wherever you are
Home.onlineDescription: Can't attend a SILC in person? SILC Online delivers the same depth of teaching and spiritual transformation directly to you.

Footer.byline: Intensive Seminar on Deliverance and Healing — founded by Pastor Tânia Tereza, based in Brazil, ministered around the world.
Footer.tagline: Five days that will change a life.
